title: Ubiquiti UA-Ultra, Access Ultra
description: Ubiquiti Access Ultra is a complete device for locking doors and subsequent control. Unlocking can be done using an NFC card, chip, or phone through UniFi Identity . The locking terminal supports 12V/1A and includes pins for exit. The reader has an IP55 rating and operates in temperatures ranging from -30 to 40 degrees Celsius. Power is supplied via PoE+ Multiple options for unlocking or temporarily sharing access Certified IP55 durability All-in-one solution Device Screws and anchors Recessed wall mount
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3at+, Yes Power type PoE PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 18
